title: Oden’s Sacrifice Sends the Scabbards to the Future
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Kanjuro, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Inuarashi as Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.
scene: Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I am,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Exactly that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Kan- JURO!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop joking around, all of us were almost executed in a boiling pot!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes that's right, and it's precisely because I'd have died with you all that I was able to fulfill the perfect role!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Since, I was a kid, ever since I lost my emotions, I've always been searching for a place to die.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: From the very beginning, the Kanjuro you all know never existed.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I experienced joy and sorrow together with you all on a daily basis,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: obtained your absolute trust...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: didn't resent any of you,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I also never intended to hurt any of you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The only thing I did was to continuously feed master Orochi, information.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Why would you do such a thing?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: My name is

dialogue.speaker: Kanjuro
dialogue.text: Kanjuro Kurozumi!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: How's that for a reason?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't believe you leaked our plan and sold out our companions!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The event that followed was really beautiful.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Say that Yasuie gave his life to change the time and place of the meeting! But since I've been informed, then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: He died needlessly!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Without the Vivre card, it's impossible to get to zoo!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When Jack appeared, you started to get suspicious, inuarashi!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Why didn't you suspect me...?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Before it came to this, why didn't any of you doubt yourselves!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It should have all been very suspicious from the beginning!!!, any and everything!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey you lot!!! It's true!!! Just like master Orochi said, there are actually some dudes heading for onigashima on a small boat!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: WaHaha!!! These guys are cracking me up!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Kan- JUROO 00!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Yes, that's right.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Bring momonouske along with you to Onigashima he said!!!".

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't believe it!!! It's actually the nine scabbards from that time.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Moreover, to think that they had a spy amongst their ranks all this time. Are you the spy?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kakaka, there would have been no greater joy than to have died with you all at sea without revealing my identity,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But this time I was stopped by master Crochi.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "You did well!!, this is the end!!!" he said.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Kine- Mon!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What!??? Master monosuke!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kanjuro
dialogue.text: What's Kanjuro doing on the Harbor!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Then the one here is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ZiipZIP

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: seems like the Kanjuro that all knew was just a drawing.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hih!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't believe you guys...to think you can keep dozing off in this kind of situation.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: OH! Is the ship fixed already?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oooo! The "Me" that has ate, slept and woke up!!! is my strongest "me*!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What is that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: fire-!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: WAAH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Gorry, we are a little late...

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden’s Fall and the Scabbards’ Future storyline with 49 dialogue beats. Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.
